title: Contraharmonic mean
body:
In mathematics, a contraharmonic mean (or antiharmonic mean) is a function complementary to the harmonic mean.  The contraharmonic mean is a special case of the Lehmer mean, 
  
    
      
        
          L
          
            p
          
        
      
    
    {\displaystyle L_{p}}
  
, where p = 2.
